title: task-progress.json Schema for HarnessDesign AI-UX Workflow
description: State machine credential file. AI reads this before every action to restore context. Scripts validate transitions against this structure.

prd_path.description: Path to the PRD file that initiated this task

current_state.description: Current position in the state machine. MVP chain: onboarding → init → alignment → research_jtbd → interaction_design → prepare_design_contract → contract_review → hifi_generation → review → knowledge_extraction → complete. Migration chain: migration → migration_complete (then dispatches to appropriate phase). States 'logic_inquisitor' and 'baseline_validation' are reserved for V0.4.

expected_next_state.description: The only valid next state. validate_transition.py checks this before allowing transition. null when complete.

states.description: Each key is a state name. Tracks pass/approval status and artifact existence.

passes.description: Whether this state's work is complete

approved_by.description: Set to 'designer' when human approves at a [STOP] control point. null if not yet approved or if state doesn't require approval.

artifacts.description: List of output file paths produced by this state (relative to task directory)

scenarios.description: Phase 3 per-scenario tracking (optional, present only during/after Phase 3)

archived_to.description: Path to archive file after scenario completion

topic_count.description: Number of topics explored so far

phase1_handoff.description: Boundary handoff bundle metadata for the Phase 1 → Phase 2 reset protocol

handoff_path.description: Path to the structured Phase 1 handoff artifact

material_manifest_path.description: Path to the Phase 1 material manifest file

validated.description: Whether the handoff bundle passed deterministic validation

validated_at.description: ISO timestamp when the handoff bundle was last validated

fresh_resume_required.description: Whether Phase 2 must begin from a fresh resume instead of continuing live chat context

archive_index.description: Index of all archived session files for recall

accumulated_constraints.description: Persistent design constraints accumulated across Phase 4 review rounds

migration_metadata.description: Present only for tasks created via /harnessdesign-migrate. Tracks migration provenance and coverage.

phases_skipped.description: Phases with full coverage that were skipped

phases_gapfilled.description: Phases with partial coverage that went through gap-fill dialogue

phases_seeded.description: Phases with seed-level coverage (artifacts provided as accelerator input)
